claim: Docker is the recommended method for running AI coding assistants like oTToDev because it provides isolated environments that prevent system-wide conflicts and API key exposure
actionable: Use Docker for deploying and running AI coding assistants to avoid dependency conflicts and improve reproducibility

claim: API key configuration is handled via .env files renamed from .env.example, and you only need to set keys for providers you plan to use
actionable: Use .env.example templates for secure credential management in AI applications
